content.summary: Repository inspection, tests, and isolated runtime reproductions establish the failures.

content.source: isolated temporary packages and repository files
content.method: code inspection, CLI reproduction, and test execution
findings: A crafted journal can overwrite a file outside the package through an in-package symlink.
A ready Intake accepts content mutation without clearing status or readiness.
A closed Intake accepts title mutation.
The profile requires evidence while capability skills emit specialized kinds.
Duplicate item ids across a section body and subsection validate.
All 63 existing tests pass, showing missing regression coverage.
interpretations: Canonical boundary, lifecycle invariants, and content-kind contracts require changes.
limitations: No external research is required because all claims are local behavior.
